external_examination: Has externally examined 10 PhD dissertations: one each in India and Ireland, three in the UK (Lancaster, Huddersfield and Coventry), one in the USA (Rutgers), one in Pakistan, and three in Nigeria. Also appointed external examiner for MPhil in Development Studies programme at University of Oxford from October 2016.
